description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 43 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 23 mins. His time was mostly in Java, with additional work in Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. The data shows activity across 6 projects.
